title: PerformanceIndicator
description: A monthly DOI performance-management indicator value — the operational metrics DOI reports to the Mayor's Office of Operations (including corruption-lecture counts and customer-service measures). Canonical schema reconciling the 'Monthly Performance Management Reports' dataset (i8ua-bnkj).

indicatorName.description: 'Indicator Name' (e.g. corruption lectures given, complaints received).

value.description: 'Month' — the indicator value for the report period (published under a column named 'Month').

reportMonth.description: 'Report Month' — the period the value covers.
